title: Creative-run manifest
description: Reproducibility + provenance record for one /mkt-creative-run (design §6.4). Records the Stage-00 input source, the brand-context snapshot + age, model ids, and every stage's artifact + prompt/skill version. Phase 1 populates Stages 00–05; per-stage scores and the claims-gate verdict are nullable here and populated by Phase 2 (the three-tier gate). Forward-compatible: nullable fields let Phase 2 fill them in without a schema change.

phase.description: Which build phase's stages this run exercised (1 = Stages 00–05).

source.description: Stage-00 input provenance — Meta MCP (read-only) or a user-provided export file. Never a secret.

input_ref.description: File path or MCP account id — never a token/secret.

connector_wired.description: Whether the meta MCP was actually wired this run.

brand_context_snapshot.description: Brand-context freshness gate (design §3c/§5.4) — recorded into the manifest, not just warned.

source.description: Which context file/set the snapshot age is read from.

updated.description: Last-updated date of the brand context.

generator.description: Model id that generated the narrative/creative.

judge.description: Rubric-judge model id — null until Phase 2 scoring.

stages.description: One entry per stage exercised. Phase 1 = stages 00–05.

stage.description: Stage number as a string, e.g. "00", "01".

prompt_version.description: Version/id of the prompt or skill ref used (reproducibility).

schema_ref.description: Path of the schema this stage's output validates against.

output_path.description: Path of the stage artifact (or null for compute-only Stage 00).

score.description: Rubric score — null until Phase 2 scoring.

claims_verdict.description: Per-stage claims-gate verdict — null until Phase 2.
Overall claims-gate verdict — populated when the deterministic floor runs (Phase 2).

checkpoints.description: Human checkpoints in the chain and their state.
